videos.title: What Happens When You Drink Celery Juice Every Morning

transcript.fullText: [Music] this will happen if you start drinking celery juice every day [Music] celery might be the most unpopular vegetable in the supermarket you'd probably think it's just a crunchy and watery stick that's just got some fiber in it and the celery juice is just as bland with a grassy and a bit zesty flavor however appearances can be deceiving celery is a low calorie vegetable packed with loads of vitamins and micronutrients while celery juice is one of the healthiest drinks you can have what will happen if you eat celery or drink celery juice every day let's find out the benefits of celery and celery juice as part of a balanced diet before we proceed please note that everything mentioned in this video is unbiased fact checked and reviewed by qualified health professionals with that said let's jump in and talk about 12 benefits of celery and celery juice number one proper hydration celery juice provides a great way of staying hydrated all day long celery itself is a healthy vegetable that's ninety percent water so with celery juice you can hit two targets with one shot staying hydrated and getting a fair share of vitamins and micronutrients most people don't get proper hydration so if you're one of them you should know that keeping your body hydrated will help with your blood pressure body temperature brain function and kidney health but if you think drinking water is too boring try celery juice stay hydrated folks number 2 prevents inflammation celery contains apigenin which is a plant compound with historical anti-inflammatory antiviral and antibacterial properties it is part of chinese traditional folk medicine a 2015 study on mice showed that apogenin could reduce the activity of inflammatory proteins and help strengthen the immune system celery is a good source of flavonoids which are anti-inflammatory compounds that can help your body steer clear of inflammations and protect your cardiovascular system if you're not yet convinced to eat celery more often its phytonutrients should convince you these chemical compounds ensure the plant's survival by protecting it from germs fungi bugs and insects but for us humans phytonutrients have incredible anti-inflammatory benefits strengthening our immune system and allowing for better intracellular communication number three important source of antioxidants antioxidants help safeguard our blood vessels cells and organs from the damaging effects of oxidative stress celery contains good amounts of vitamin c beta-carotene flavonoids and other 12 types of antioxidant nutrients the phytonutrients in celery also have remarkable antioxidant properties they are believed to repair the dna damage resulting from toxins you can eat celery and actually enjoy it in soups salads or cook dishes celery juice might never become your favorite juice but it's incredibly healthy for you as part of a balanced diet so don't push it away either liking our videos so far before we move on to the next food don't forget to hit the like button and subscribe to our channel so you never miss out on our new informative videos number four weight loss celery is low in calories one stack is about 10 calories and what's even more impressive is that you get 1.6 grams of fiber from one cup if you want to push the breaking pedal on your food cravings you should eat more fiber so one glass of celery juice can make you feel full for longer and maintain a calorie deficit in your pursuit of losing weight you can burn some calories in the gym and then hydrate with a good glass of celery juice what is more celery is low in sugar 240 milliliters of celery juice has only 5 grams of natural sugar replace your favorite sodas or energy drinks with celery juice and you might get rid of 500 calories in one shot we're serious but you can also eat celery as snacks simmer it a bit season it with your favorite herbs and some salt and pepper you'll see you'll begin to like the taste number five it's good for your liver studies show that eating celery can help reduce the fat buildup in the liver due to its alkaline and watery compounds so celery can help protect your liver and support the production of enzymes that flush the toxins and fats out if you're looking for more ways of eating celery here's a fun and delicious one it's called california avocado tacos and you can use about half a cup of chopped celery for a couple of servings it's delicious you won't regret trying this recipe number six it is good for your gut bacteria celery contains two important plant compounds that are thought to reduce inflammation in the gut luteolin and pyrologquinol quinine pqq one study performed on mice for 12 weeks showed that probiotic fermented celery juice can create a much healthier gut bacteria environment however you should note that fermented celery juice is different from fresh juice celery fermentation is quite a straightforward process and it takes about a week so no need to worry on that front although more research is needed on gut bacteria we already know that eating celery will provide your body with a considerable amount of fiber which helps fight constipation and allows for good digestion number seven helps balance your blood pressure in chinese traditional medicine celery extracts were used for reducing blood pressure levels modern scientists took an interest in the possible effects of celery extracts on blood pressure in rats with artificially induced hypertension the study showed positive results reducing blood pressure in rats with hypertension however more research is needed on the topic but we should not forget that eating celery will help you get a good amount of fiber studies have confirmed that diets rich in fiber can positively affect blood pressure so if you want to eat celery and do something different how about a little recipe of celery and spinach shred some carrots and throw them on a pasta with some diced celery bell peppers and corn eat them on a bed of spinach and your favorite low-fat salad dressing yummy you see eating celery is not boring at all number eight good digestion celery is good for the stomach it contains pectin-based polysaccharides and an interesting compound known as appium on which have been shown to decrease the risk of developing ulcers as animal studies have shown these compounds are impressive at lining the stomach and regulating the stomach secretions more studies are indeed needed in this respect but we can't overlook the fact that celery is 90 water this combined with the increased amounts of soluble and insoluble fiber helps support a healthy digestive tract preventing constipation so eating celery will help with your digestion in the long term if you enjoy tuna or chicken salad you can use celery to add a little texture mix some chopped celery with mustard tuna or chicken and serve it with whole wheat bread it's a treat number nine rich in vitamins and minerals celery and celery juice will provide your body with essential vitamins and minerals such as vitamin a k c potassium and folate celery is also low in sodium and has a low glycemic index this means it won't spike your blood sugar levels what is more a cup of celery will also get you eight percent of the daily value of calcium seven percent of the dv of magnesium 14 of the dv of potassium 16 of the dv of vitamin c and 74 of the dv of vitamin k so it's quite a powerhouse vegetable number 10 prevent heartburn and acid reflux celery is an alkaline food in theory its low acidity will help you prevent nasty heartburns or acid reflux it's true more studies need to be done to confirm the exact effect of celery juice on acid reflux however people who used to drink celery juice regularly have reported positive results in this respect number 11 stronger bones we don't really think about the health of our bones except if we happen to break something however our bones need their fair share of vitamins and nutrients to support our body and mind celery juice could help as it's rich in calcium and silicon two compounds that have a role in strengthening and regenerating our bones what is more celery is rich in vitamin k another essential vitamin that contributes to our bone growth and resorption preventing serious diseases such as osteoporosis so that glass of celery juice can do wonders for your skeletal system or if you're not a fan of the juice try some celery based recipes like celery salsa try that with tortilla chips and you won't regret it number 12 regulates cholesterol levels in a study by the university of chicago we found that a chemical present in celery called phthalide reduced cholesterol levels by seven percent that is something moreover it also reduced blood pressure levels by 18 other sources speak of a compound called 3n butyl phthalide a natural product of celery seeds which acts as a promising therapeutic agent that significantly reduces bad cholesterol levels and high blood pressure celery juice might also reduce the buildup of fatty deposits on the arteries walls and increase their elasticity celery and celery juice might not represent your favorites when it comes to vegetables and juice however their benefits are pretty important to your body so don't ignore them you don't have to drink celery juice or eat celery every day but make sure you include celery on your diet plan enjoyed this video hit the like button and subscribe to our channel for more informative videos like this one thanks for watching your wellness is our mission [Music]

transcript.fullText: so what would happen if you ate celery or drank celery juice every single day now there's so many amazing foods that create very cool effects on your body and celery is one of them but unfortunately there's not a lot of emphasis on using foods to handle body problems i mean if you take a look at wikipedia for example there's all this missing information on the benefits of using celery for various health conditions i mean i'm going to put the research down in the description below but basically wikipedia basically says it does nothing there's no research etc etc but the problem with wikipedia as a source of information is they're not really focused on truthful information or correct information they're focused more on the majority opinion or who has the loudest or persistent voice but i've said this before and i'll say it again what i have found is you take what everyone agrees on absolutely as truth especially in the area of health and you're going to find the truth is more in the exact opposite direction but let me get back to celery one stalk of celery is only like 20 calories it's 95 water so you really only have five percent nutrients but that five percent can create some really cool effects in fact before the 16th century uh celery was used as a medicine not as a food it was used in arabic countries it was used in india china so celery goes way back there's this very interesting compound called 3n butyl phthalates and this phytonutrient relaxes smooth muscle okay so it helps you lower your blood pressure it helps with asthma and bronchitis if the coronary artery is constricted it can help to vasodilate that and help get more oxygen and blood flow to the heart muscle this compound also helps any type of muscle spasm in the body so if your muscles are very very tight and spasmodic cellular juice can help you so if you compare that compound and its effect with certain type of medications for blood pressure a lot of the blood pressure medications make you end up feeling fatigued lightheaded and even forgetful and that has to do with what those medications do to blood flow in your brain so it basically can help you lower your blood pressure without any side effects that's cool and it also has an effect on cortisol so if cortisol is lowered you're going to feel calmer you're going to have less anxiety you're going to have better sleeping so a good time to have celery is like right after dinner and sometimes i replace that with my salad so sometimes i won't have a salad i might have four or five or six stalks of celery and sometimes i'll add peanut butter sometimes not but i'll make sure that the peanut butter is organic because of the pesticides and one point about celery celery is unfortunately one of those vegetables that comes with a lot of pesticides at least 15 different pesticides so always consume organic celery because you don't need all those chemicals all right the next cool effect that celery or celery juice has on your body is in the kidney so celery or celery juice can decrease your risk of getting kidney stones it can help dissolve kidney stones it can also help dissolve uric acid crystals as in gout because it actually lowers uric acid so in one study just using like 34 milligrams of celery seed extract two times a day created a significant improvement in pain it was like 68 less pain and celery seed extract also works with osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis so it creates a significant reduction in pain and i think one reason it works in gout is it's a very good alkalizer and anytime you change the ph of your urine to make it slightly more alkaline the uric acid crystals cannot be formed so these crystals basically don't get formed and you don't have gout pain celery is good to help decrease the risk of stroke and also recovery from a stroke probably because it relaxes the smooth muscle and in your arteries as well as increasing circulation all right epigenin this is another phytonutrient in celery that has a very powerful effect on your blood sugars so anytime you're going to improve blood sugars you're going to make insulin more sensitive you're going to improve conditions like insulin resistance and all the other effects that happen when you improve that like weight loss less fatty liver improved heart better energy in the list goes on and on and on epigenin is a very powerful anti-inflammatory so celery can help get rid of inflammation and of course that's going to help arthritis and rheumatoid and things like that as well there's also some research on that compound increasing neurogenesis which is the re-growing of nerve cells all right moving right along i found another study that drinking celery juice improves eye strain okay so let's say you're in front of the computer all the time and your tired eyes celery juice can help as well as improving blurred vision in another study i found that certain compounds in celery juice have a similar effect to milk thistle as liver protection and that's pretty cool milk thistle has very powerful hepatoprotective properties it can protect the liver cells from poisons toxins medications well apparently celery has a similar effect which is very cool also celery can increase bile flow helping you produce more bile celery juice is very antibacterial it's antiviral and like i said before it's alkalizing so if you have too much acidity that could be a problem so let's say for example you're doing a prolonged fast and you're on the ketogenic diet and you have like massive ketones and your ph is too much on the asset side celery juice can help alkalize you now i'm going to put a link down below to help you identify if you're too alkaline or too acid celery juice also has higher amounts of sodium but it's nothing to worry about it's not that significant and in addition to that you have higher amounts of potassium so the potassium and sodium ratios are really good with celery juice and this is why it's really good for fluid retention edema it's good to hydrate you it's good to balance your fluids it's basically a good electrolyte so in summary if you were to start consuming celery or celery juice on a regular basis you're going to notice your kidneys are going to be healthier you're going to have less gout uric acid and arthritis you're going to sleep better you're going to have less stress and overall you're going to feel very relaxed now one point i want to bring up about celery juice when you're fasting because the sugar content in celery juice is so minor so you're not going to have to really worry about the celery juice bumping you out of ketosis if you're going to drink a small amount of it and especially if you don't add things like apple juice or carrot juice or a little cellar juice either in the morning or during the day i think it'd be a really great thing to do for your overall health even if you are doing fasting now if you videos.title: Celery Juice Everyday?! Legit or Total Joke?

transcript.fullText: so celery is randomly popular now good people are talking about consuming celery juice now history seems to repeat itself because I kind of remember celery becoming popular about 10 or 15 years ago as well okay now there's nothing wrong with celery and I'm not making fun of it or anything like that but what I did want to do is educate the masses on celery juice and celery and explain why it's getting so popular right now the main reason that's getting popular is simply because history repeats itself all it takes is a couple of people with a large following or a decent platform to talk about it and next thing you know it's running rampant again anyhow before we get started you are tuned into the internet's leading performance nutrition and fat loss channel new videos coming out every single Tuesday Friday and Sunday at 7 a.m. Pacific time and a bunch of other videos throughout the week as well make sure you hit the little bell button to turn on notifications and check out highly calm for special pricing on all the latest and greatest apparel that I'm always wearing in my videos alright so this whole celery juice thing started with someone by the name of Anthony William he's also known as the medical medium out on the Internet and his whole claim to fame is that he found that by drinking celery juice you could rid yourself of all these different ailments and all these issues ok 16 ounces of raw unfiltered celery juice first thing in the morning can cure so many different things all right so I'm not anti celery and I'm not anti juice I'm not anything like that the fact of the matter is is when you start making outlandish claims you put yourself out there and you make yourself a target so we have to talk about this a little bit now Anthony Williams approach to celery juice is that celery contains something known as cluster salts and these cluster salts are very very powerful at killing off pathogens so his theory is that because of these cluster salts they absorb into the body and they kill off any pathogens that kill off bad bacteria they kill off viruses they help rebalance our body etc etc the problem is that there's nothing proving that cluster salts exist or don't exist we just have to take his word for it and what our cluster salts well evidently there are a subgroup of sodium that are clustered together so basically sodium molecules that are in specific clusters that supposedly react within our bodies a specific way there's again nothing claiming this is true or not true we have to take one man's word for it so that's where we have to be a little bit skeptical now what I do want to do is I want to address the fact that celery has some very unique benefits and this whole celery juice thing may not be without merit like there's actually some benefits to it but more than likely it's from some of the phenolic acids from the flavonoids or from the antioxidant effects more so than cluster salts if that even is a thing you see they're very very nutrient dense celery is awesome whenever you're making a juice I recommend that you use celery as your base for this reason and most of the reason that you're feeling good when you consume celery or celery juice is simply because it's so high in potassium and so high in the electrolytes that you do need that it helps balance you out it's also super high in water so if you're someone is just getting started on a health regime and you're probably not very hydrated your electrolytes are out of whack you're probably going to feel better when you consume celery it's pretty darn simple okay especially if your electrolytes are out of whack anyway now we're electrical creature so whenever we balance our electrolytes we're gonna feel more in line our nervous systems gonna operate better it's not really rocket science it's more like electrical engineering there was actually a study that was published in the Journal of evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine took a look at nine different studies looking at celery and celery juice and it found that there were some pretty powerful anti-inflammatory effects in fact more than pretty powerful very powerful anti-inflammatory effects had to do with the caffeic acid with the tannin with the quercetin with the camp ferrol some of these very powerful things and especially the phenolic acid you see phenolic acid is readily absorbed through our small intestine a lot of antioxidants and a lot of flavonoids don't get absorbed but phenolic acid is pretty specific it's pretty powerful it can absorb through the small intestine and then it inhibits the production of something known as nuclear factor Kappa B talked about it a lot in my videos nuclear factor Kappa B is a very important pathway within the body when it comes down to inflammation when we reduce nuclear factor Kappa B we can affect cyclooxygenase enzyme 2 which means we can actually reduce joint pain and we can feel better so yeah there is some merit to consuming celery and celery juice you actually might feel better in your joints you might feel just cleaner and lighter and less brain fog you might just overall feel better but I think the big one that we're talking about when it comes on to celery is the quercetin okay and quercetin is a supplement that people take all the time powerful antioxidant that has been shown in multiple studies to boost glutathione levels okay glutathione just to recap really quick is the body's master antioxidant okay glutathione is produced within the body to neutralize the primary free radicals that need to be neutralized in order for the body to actually function it's a natural process within our body and if we're depleted in glutathione then we don't feel good when we drink alcohol it depletes our glutathione stores our glutathione has to neutralize all the compounds coming from the alcohol so we get depleted in it and we feel rundown we look sickly we look pale we look poor complexion all of that so when we restore glutathione levels we feel better so if the quercetin in the celery helps out with that then yeah you're gonna look and feel better so no denying that but the other thing that quercetin does is it blocks histamine okay so if you've ever taken an antihistamine before you know that it helps you recover from any kind of anaphylaxis or it helps you recover from any kind of allergic response right well if you have that happening at a small scale just because you're having a histamine response to something you're going to be inflated you're gonna have puffiness and water attention and that quercetin is going to help balance that out so a lot of times people consume celery and all of a sudden they drop some water weight they lose some inflammation they lose some allergic response so again this is not saying that celery is a joke and saying that the benefits from celery are coming from very simple things that are easy to explain now one thing that we have to address here too is the whole blood pressure thing this is where it gets a little bit sketchy there's people out there in the internet that are telling you that if you consume celery juice first thing in the morning you're gonna be able to control your blood pressure drop it down get off your blood pressure medication yada yada alright I understand why people would say that and I came out of the farmer world before so like I get it and I understand how terrible pharmaceuticals can be and how you want to get people off of them I totally get it but you have to be careful with how you talk to the masses with that because it's not actually celery juice that modulates blood pressure it's celery seed extract that's been shown and you're not getting any of that celery seed extract when you're drinking celery juice in fact a lot of the benefit is actually going out the window you're better off just eat celery or take a celery seed extract if you want to get the full spectrum benefits but then lastly we need to talk about the digestive effect cuz this is one of the biggest claims is being made the claim is that if you drink 16 ounces of raw and filtered celery juice that you're gonna end up having a bunch of digestive effects you're gonna end up digesting food better absorbing nutrients better you're gonna get rid of all videos.title: Drinking Celery Juice for 7/10/30 Days? Doctor highlights 4 Questions You should ask before doing so

transcript.fullText: hi i'm dr chan welcome to the daily dose and in today's episode of asking the right questions i'm going to talk about celery juice in particular this practice of drinking a big cup of celery juice first thing in the morning for 7 10 14 or whatever other number of days a trend that first blew up in 2019 and which saw many people trying it and then sharing the experiences on social media especially on instagram and youtube where it became trendy to try this daily celery juice regimen most did it for 7 days others did it for 10-14 days and there were even some who did it for months such videos were so hot that many of them got millions of views leading to many more others doing the same that is drinking celery juice every day for x number of days and then documenting the experiences on video and sharing them on instagram or youtube so if you have been thinking about trying this celery juice daily regimen yourself because you have watched some of these videos of the people sharing testimonials of the health benefits that they felt they got from doing it but have been wondering whether it is really healthy or safe to do so here are four questions that i suggest that you ask and be satisfied with the answers before you jump into it question number one does it work the youtube videos of people who tried it were mostly positive some were negative sharing problems they had and why it didn't quite work for them but most were positive many felt good some lost weight others shared other health improvements that they felt were from drinking celery juice daily so it seemed to work for them but the question you should be asking that you should ask yourself is just because it worked for them does it mean it would also definitely work for me too at this point many people will be saying it's just vegetable juice what's the worst that can happen from drinking vegetable juice daily even if it does not work what's the harm so question number two is is it safe going by the video testimonials on youtube most people had no problems or side effects from it so it must be safe it must be okay right really the second question i suggest you ask is just because it was safe for them does it mean that it would also definitely be safe for me too and for those of you who are thinking of doing this for longer than the more common seven days the additional question you should be asking is this just because it was safe nothing happened for many of the people you saw on youtube doing this for 7 days does it mean it would also definitely be safe doing this daily for 30 days for 60 days 90 days or more next other than whether it works whether it is safe the next question that is important to us is whether it is healthy many of the testimonials on youtube were positive with many people sharing how they think how they felt drinking celery juice daily helped them in many different ways i am not in any way suggesting that the improvement that these people sort of felt were not rare but even if they were real the third question the question i am suggesting that you ask is this just because something helped weight loss improved complexion or concentration or whatever other improvement in a person's physical or mental wellness does it necessarily mean that it is also definitely healthy healthy in the full sense of the word including and especially in terms of the long-term impact on all aspects of health lastly the final question i suggest you ask is is it a distraction does it distract you from tackling the foundational and critical aspects of your lifestyle and dietary habits that obviously needed changing or improving for example if you are obviously still having too much sugar in your diet shouldn't you go tackle that first or if you are obviously not having enough vegetables both in terms of quantity and variety in your diet regularly and consistently enough wouldn't it be more important to go try and improve that first so these are the four questions that i suggest you ask yourself and be 100 satisfied with the answers before jumping into trying this celery juice daily regimen that is does it work is it safe in particular ask yourself even though many people you saw on youtube had shared testimonials that they worked and was safe for them ask yourself ask critically would that necessarily mean that it would also definitely work or be safe for you as well thirdly is it healthy revisit the definition of what is healthy ask just because something helps some people to improve this does it necessarily mean that it is definitely also healthy overall and in the long run as well lastly is it a distraction does it distract you from tackling other critical aspects of your lifestyle and diet that obviously needed changing or improving don't get me wrong i do enjoy a glass of celery juice every now and then all i want to achieve from this video is to bring new perspectives and help people ask the right questions before making decisions critical decisions regarding the lifestyle and diet that will affect their health in the long run i hope you have found this episode of asking the right questions useful i am dr chan let habits be thy medicine let's unlock the power of habits as medicine one habit one dose at a time

videos.channel: Clean Eating Kitchen - with Carrie Forrest, MPH
videos.title: How to Make Celery Juice (in a Juicer or Blender)

transcript.fullText: hi everybody and welcome back to my channel clean eating kitchen I'm Terry and today we're gonna be making celery juice and I'm gonna show you two ways one is in a traditional juicer and the other is in a blender so let's get started and be sure to subscribe to my channel to get notified of all the new videos let's go so I like to use an Omega juicer to make my fresh celery juice and what I did was start with two big bunches of celery that I washed and chopped into stock and then I just run them through my omega juicer and that's how I got the fresh celery juice it's ideal to serve the juice on the same day that you make it but you can always store any excess juice and a tightly sealed container in the refrigerator and enjoy it up to about 24 hours after you move it now in order to make cell reaches without a juicer we're going to use a high-speed blender and just a little bit of water and so what we'll do is add the celery stalks to the high-speed blender and then add just about a third of a cup of water now blend on high for about a minute until the celery is all mixed in with the water and blended really well next we're going to use a clean nut milk bag that I've put over a picture and we'll pour our celery and water mixture through the nut milk bag and press it through so we've just half the juice so in this way you have two ways to make celery juice either in a juicer or a blender Cheers [Music]

videos.title: Dietitian Reveals Shocking Truth About Celery Juice Benefits

transcript.fullText: if you're chugging glasses of celery juice every day because you've heard it's a miracle cure all for conditions from cancer to diabetes then stay tuned because today as a registered dietitian and diabetes educator i'm revealing the truth behind celery juice and your health [Music] hey everybody aaron here with healthy mom happy family and i am so excited today to talk with you all about a topic i get asked about all the time celery juice okay there are so many claims online about celery juice and touting it as a miracle food and how drinking this juice can cure so many diseases and there are a lot of people out there and you might be one of them who are drinking glass after glass of celery juice every single day hoping to gain the amazing health benefits that it promises but how many of you are actually in love with drinking celery juice you know if you're just drinking it and you're grudgingly trying to chug the celery juice every day and you don't like it then we have to talk about if this is truly something worthwhile or if maybe it's just another overhyped fat so today i am sharing all the science with you about celery juice and i'm revealing everything you need to know about celery juice and your health now before we dive in i just want to remind you that if you are actively trying to prevent type 2 diabetes or manage diabetes and you're looking for tips and tricks and recipes i want to invite you to subscribe and hit that notification bell so you never miss a new video okay so let's talk about celery and celery juice if you are actively trying to manage diabetes or lower your blood sugar levels or lower your blood pressure i am sure many of the claims that you read about celery juice can seem really really appealing but i want to look at what the science says with you okay so let's take a look at some facts now celery does contain phytochemicals in it that have been shown to reduce blood pressure and that's great news especially if you have diabetes because we know that we're at a higher risk of having heart disease so lowering blood pressure is very important but there's something i really want you to pay attention to okay this is very important the phytochemicals that they find that lower the blood pressure they're not unique to celery juice okay they are in whole celery too so whether you drink the juice or you eat celery in its whole form you're getting the same benefit okay so if you love celery but you don't love celery juice you still get the same benefit that way okay so now let's talk about the flavonoids and celery because the flavonoids and celery have been found to fight off inflammation again this is great news because we know that chronic inflammation is the root cause of many chronic illnesses but i do have a spoiler alert for you okay spoiler alert again these flavonoids are both in celery juice and whole celery they're in both okay and they're also really really important to pay attention to is that they're not unique to celery you can also find these in foods like parsley artichokes spinach and that's just a few of them so any of these foods in your diet will help offer those same health benefits it doesn't have to be just celery now another claim i wanted to talk about in regards to celery is its ability to fight off oxidative stress now what this is is this is basically an imbalance of free radicals and antioxidants in the body now celery actually does help support this but again it's not unique to the juice we find the same benefit in the whole vegetable so whether you choose to eat celery or celery juice they're both giving you that same benefit okay so let's talk about what the deal is on celery juice why does celery juice get all this glory and no one's talking about whole celery so here's the thing the compounds that are found in celery that offer all these health benefits are found in whole celery as well as the juice like i said they're not unique to the juice but there is a benefit to having the celery as a juice okay because when we juice celery you can get it in a much more concentrated form so you can eat a lot more celery in a juice form than you would typically be able to because you're not going to sit down and just eat cups and cups of celery all day having a glass of celery juice is more concentrated so that really is the difference and it is easier to consume more calorie celery so you get more benefits that way if you're drinking it as a juice but i do want you to remember that when you juice a vegetable you do lose some beneficial nutrients and the main one that you lose is fiber and we know that fiber has so many health benefits of its own especially if you're not meeting your daily fiber goals it can promote healthy weight can stabilize blood sugar it can feed the beneficial bacteria in your gut and that's really key because we know that promoting gut health is really important in preventing future disease risk and reducing inflammation okay so celery in its whole form has a lot of benefits too and namely you get more fiber that way okay so let's talk about what the bottom line is here's the deal if you like drinking celery juice go for it i am not stopping you there is no harm in drinking celery juice but remember it is not a quick fix it is not a cure-all it is not a miracle food drinking celery juice is not going to make up for an imbalanced diet the rest of the day it's not going to make up for a lack of exercise a lack of sleep i think you get the idea here right we can't just drink celery juice and call it a day you have to focus on all the areas of health that truly prevent and reverse diseases like diabetes okay the other thing i want you to remember is that the benefits in celery juice are not unique to this juice so if you don't like celery juice stop forcing yourself to guzzle it every single day you should only be eating and drinking things that you really enjoy and eating celery in its whole form is still going to provide you with the same beneficial nutrients and remember there are other foods like spinach and artichoke that contain many of the same beneficial nutrients so you don't have to just eat celery or just drink celery juice to get these benefits okay if you prefer to have a spinach salad over celery do that right or throw some spinach in your smoothie it doesn't have to just be celery juice to get the benefits so what i really want you to remember is that we can all benefit from having more vegetables in our diet and celery is a great choice but it isn't a superior choice and juice versus whole vegetable really doesn't make a difference in the health benefits that it provides now vegetable juice is more concentrated so it is an easier way to get more nutrients in from the vegetables but it does come at the cost of removing the fiber so what's key to remember is that it is all about balance if you rely on vegetable juice each day just make sure that you're also adding whole vegetables into your diet to gain the benefits of the fiber as well nothing wrong with the juice but make sure we're balancing it out with the whole vegetables as well and if you don't like celery juice you don't have to be drinking it try adding whole celery or some of those other choices that well that still give you those beneficial nutrients so what do you think let me know have you been drinking celery juice does this change your opinion on it at all and have you noticed any difference when you have it or don't let me know in the comments below and if you liked today's video don't forget to subscribe so you never miss new tips tricks and recipes thanks for joining me [Music] you

videos.title: Celery Juice | How To Make Celery Juice In A Blender

transcript.fullText: so celery juice has sort of taken over the Internet lately we are talking all things celery juice I counted a little bit over 30 heads of celery I am about to try my celery juice and since celery juice has become this huge thing all of a sudden I figured I'd show you guys how to make celery juice without a juicer mainly because I don't own a juicer but I do own a blender and that's all you need to make today's celery juice recipe so let's get started so if we're making celery juice we obviously need some cel and for today's recipe we're going to be using two large stocks of celery so we're going to go ahead and get those out of our fridge and as you're seeing here a lot of times there's dirt on celery so what you want to do is wash this really really well because obviously you're not going to want to drink that dirt so bring your celery over to your sink and give it a really good washing and scrubbing with your hands and I even recommend that you pull the celery apart and wash the inside stocks of the celery as well just to be on the safe side so once you've washed both stocks that's when you want to bring them over to your cutting board and cut off both ends of the celery once you've removed both ends that's when you want to trim up any extra stragglers that are attached to the celery and when you've taken care of those that's when you want to cut the celery into thirds by the way don't get rid of the hearts of the celery the lighter pieces of celery because these are typically the sweetest pieces of celery so you won't want to throw these away all right so at this point we've chopped up both stocks of celery into thirds and you want to start adding those pieces of celery to your blank blender my blender is an auster it's fantastic it's kind of a mid-range blender it's not super expensive but it's also not super cheap and if you're in the market for a new blender this is the one that I'd go with obviously I own this one so there'll be a link for it in the video description below if you want to get it anyways at this point we should have our first batch of celery added to our blender and now we're just going to add a/4 cup of water to help get things started in there so now at this point we can pop the top onto our blender and start blending our celery and it's really common that in the beginning of blending the celery this celery might not reach the blades that well so what I like to do is take the handle of a spatula and just start pressing the celery down into the blades this just helps expedite the process a little bit more so I guess that's my Pro tip for you if you happen to run into a situation like that but really it's only going to happen in the first batch of blending your celery once that first batch of celery Blends down it should be smooth sailing from there and you should have no problem blending the rest of your celery so once you've got all the celery Blended you want to get out a nutmilk bag or a cheesecloth I'm using a nutmilk bag today if you want to pick these up they're a link in the video description below to them and you're also going to want to get out a large cup as well I recommend a large measuring cup just because it's easy to pour anyways no matter what bowl you decide to go with you want to line it with the nutmilk bag or the cheesecloth and then you want to add all the celery juice from the blender into the nutmilk bag so this is the workout part of the juice making process and this is where you're going to have to squeeze all of the juice out of the nutmilk bag and it's definitely going to take a couple of minutes to get all the juice or most of the juice out of the bag so just be patient with it but eventually you'll end up with 3 to 4 cups of deliciously vibrant celery juice I recommend storing it in the fridge for up to 3 days and I hope you guys enjoy it

videos.title: Drink Celery Juice Daily For 2 Months And The Results Will Surprise You

transcript.fullText:
Drink Celery Juice Daily For 2 Months And
The Results Will Surprise You Celery juice is an alternative drink for those
who want to adopt a healthy lifestyle. As the name implies, celery juice is squeezed
from celery vegetables. There are many benefits associated with the
juice versus the vegetable whole. There were numerous wellbeing claims made
about celery juice, identifying with immense scope of conditions from dermatitis to hypertension. Have you been aware of how celery juice could
benefit your body? In today’s video, we will share with you
the 12 health benefits of drinking celery juice daily. #1 AIDS IN WEIGHT LOSS
Drinking celery juice has so many nutritional benefits. One major benefit of drinking celery juice
is organic weight loss. It's high in fiber, so it fills you up and
makes you less hungry. It's also packed with good nutrition and vitamins,
which is a big bonus when you want to lose weight, but do not want to feel tired and
sluggish. Talking about sluggish, celery juice keeps
your bowels regular, so you don't end up constipated when you diet. Are you trying to find a more effective weight-loss
method? Start drinking more of this juice. As celery is filled with vitamins and nutrients,
it is perfect to satiate your cravings. Since it is low in calories, making a habit
of consuming more of this juice will help you shed more weight sooner than you think. Do you find this video interesting so far? Please don't forget to subscribe to my channel. Hit the Like button and ring the notification
bell if you want to see more content like this. #2 PREVENT LIVER DISEASE
There are more than five hundred important functions associated with the liver. It is an important organ in the body that
helps in bile production, excretion of cholesterol, and hormones; it also metabolizes fat and
proteins. Alcohol, hepatitis, cirrhosis of the liver,
Hepatitis B and C are all diseases that affect the liver and promote liver failure. The good news is that regular consumption
of celery juice can protect liver health and prevent these diseases. #3 HELP LOWER CHOLESTEROL LEVELS
As much as possible, people are trying their best to inhibit the risk of high levels of
cholesterols. Having high levels of cholesterol increases
the risk of a heart attack. So, how can celery help you reduce your cholesterol
level? A unique compound has been found in celery. It is called 3-n-butylphthalide, and it has
been proven lipid-lowering property. This compound positively affects blood pressure
and acts as a diuretic. It helps to reduce the density of the fluids,
and it also relaxes the arteries. Alongside that, it reduces the resistance
of blood flow. Through a study, the rats were given the celery
extract as part of their high-fat diet, and they were observed to have lower levels of
lipids low concentrations of cholesterol in their blood afterward. Besides, a phytonutrient known as phthalides
content of celery juice helps relax the smooth muscles around the blood vessels, leading
to low blood pressure. #4 HELPS GET RID OF ACNE
Hormonal fluctuations often trigger acne. Therefore, celery juice can maintain these
hormonal fluctuations, thereby minimizing the incidence of acne. Because of that, celery stick juice is also
recommended to be consumed for women a few days before menstruation. Because having anti-inflammatory properties,
celery juice is quite effective in helping to cure stomach cramps. #5 RICH IN ANTIOXIDANTS
The high content of beta carotene, vitamin C, flavonoids, and other antioxidant compounds
in celery stalks makes it an antioxidant source. Of course, this is very much needed by the
body because air pollution is getting worse day by day and an unhealthy lifestyle makes
the body vulnerable to free radicals. So, to meet the body's antioxidant needs,
celery juice can be an option to counter these unwanted free cell radicals that are harmful
to the body. #6 HELPS SMOOTH OUT THE DIGESTIVE SYSTEM
Celery contains a lot of fiber that works to treat constipation. It stimulates your digestive system, helping
it eliminate wastes easier. If you suffer from constipation, celery juice
is highly recommended for you. It's a natural laxative because it relaxes
the nerves in your bowels, making it easier for your system to be more regular. Celery aids digestion. Indeed, it promotes the production of hydrochloric
acid in the stomach, allowing better digestion of food and guaranteeing a non-acidic digestive
system. It is also one of the richest vegetables in
fiber and water. It is a natural prebiotic that nourishes our
intestinal flora. It helps fight bloating and constipation. #7 CELERY JUICE IS AN EXCELLENT HYPOTENSION
A chemical called phthalide in celery juice has a remarkable effect on blood circulation. It enhances the relaxation of the muscles
surrounding the arteries. This muscle contributes to a vasodilating
effect and explains the decrease in blood pressure. The existence of mineral salts such as magnesium,
potassium, and calcium also wage war against hypertension. They regulate the imbalance in the number
of liquids existing in all the organisms. Frequently, an excess of liquid causes a rise
in pressure in the blood vessels. Celery also purifies the blood. It makes it smoother. Indeed, this vegetable facilitates blood circulation. Efficient blood circulation in the blood vessels
is synonymous with moderate blood pressure. #8 A GREAT ANTI-INFLAMMATORY DRINK
If you're battling with inflammation, take advantage of that big green stick of celery
in your fridge! Did you know that drinking one glass of celery
juice a day can lessen the risk of osteoporosis? It can also help reduce the chances of encountering
inflammation in the muscles, tendons, and other body parts. It is the perfect juice if you exercise a
lot as well. Additionally, it turns out that celery is
not only necessary for our body minerals and vitamins. It has other essential constituents, and they
are called phytonutrients. Phytonutrients are the chemicals found in
most plants. They act as the inhibitors of such various
threats. #9 RELIEVE SKIN ISSUES AND PROMOTE A CLEAR
COMPLEXION Women who want to have skin that always looks
young and without the slightest blemish concoct formulas based on celery. And it works. Do you know why? Because this ingredient contains antioxidants. These antioxidants adequately fight against
premature aging of the skin in particular. It also offers a moisturizing effect and a
glowing effect on the skin. For the hair, celery juice is an effective
remedy for dandruff. It vitalizes the scalp and promotes hair growth. The antioxidant in celery-like polyacetylene
relieves inflammation. Similarly, vitamin C, another antioxidant
in celery, also supports brain function. #10 IMPROVE YOUR SLEEP
In case you are looking for insomnia remedies right now. This is one of the best celery juice advantages,
and you can start falling asleep on a nightly basis without any issues. It is an amazing benefit for some because
it is also a natural boost when you've had a long and hard day. The benefit is in the magnesium. This mineral helps relax the nervous system,
so you feel tired and calm. Those with magnesium deficiency will find
it harder to sleep and are often stressed at even the slightest problem. It is not easy to control until you deal with
the deficiency problem. Drinking celery juice also helps to normalize
blood pressure. This is a common reason for insomnia because
it can raise stress levels. #11 HELP PREVENTS CANCER
The antioxidant in celery contributes greatly to preventing the most dreaded disease, cancer. Apart from the antioxidant, there are also
coumarins. This shields every cell in our body against
cancer. The polyacetylenes found in this juice also
inhibit the development of potentially cancerous cells. The risk of getting pancreatic cancer is probably
reduced under the effect of two polyphenols, including luteolin and apigenin. It also contains phytoestrogen, which, in
cooperation with estrogen, prevents the proliferation of cancer cells in the uterus and breast. You have been warned, ladies. This is why this celery juice is powerful
for our health and wellbeing. #12 IT SUPPORTS HYDRATION
Celery juice has high water content and is about 95 percent water by weight. The water in celery is excellent for keeping
you hydrated. It's easy to see why this is critical, as
water is involved with numerous reactions and processes throughout our body. Even being mildly dehydrated is sufficient
to decrease your energy levels and concentration. Chronic dehydration can lead to many other
health problems and potentially increase disease risk. Getting sufficient water is one of the easiest
ways to keep you healthy and doing well. Drinking water should still be your main go-to,
but water-rich foods like celery can help promote Hydration. Drinking celery juice should be a habit you
have to grow. You need to understand that it's not a complete
solution to the condition you are facing, but it can alleviate the symptoms by ensuring
that you are getting the right amount of micronutrients. The juice even comes packed with essential
potassium vitamins, including K, C, A, which boosts Hydration, among other benefits. Before eating anything else, you need to take
at least sixteen ounces of celery juice for maximum nutritional value. You still have to make sure that it is fresh
and plain without additional ingredients. You should know that this juice is medicinal
and not caloric. This implies that you'll still need to take
breakfast to get you through the morning. But, this should be done sixteen minutes after
consuming your juice. Will you start drinking celery juice after
watching this video? Let us know in the comment section below. Make sure to subscribe so you don’t miss
out on my future videos. Don’t forget to like and share. Stay Healthy.

segments.text:
Drink Celery Juice Daily For 2 Months And
The Results Will Surprise You

Celery juice is an alternative drink for those
who want to adopt a healthy lifestyle.

As the name implies, celery juice is squeezed
from celery vegetables.

There are many benefits associated with the
juice versus the vegetable whole.

There were numerous wellbeing claims made
about celery juice, identifying with immense
scope of conditions from dermatitis to hypertension.

Have you been aware of how celery juice could
benefit your body?

In today’s video, we will share with you
the 12 health benefits of drinking celery
juice daily.

#1 AIDS IN WEIGHT LOSS
Drinking celery juice has so many nutritional
benefits.

One major benefit of drinking celery juice
is organic weight loss.

It's high in fiber, so it fills you up and
makes you less hungry.

It's also packed with good nutrition and vitamins,
which is a big bonus when you want to lose

weight, but do not want to feel tired and
sluggish.

Talking about sluggish, celery juice keeps
your bowels regular, so you don't end up constipated
when you diet.

Are you trying to find a more effective weight-loss
method?
Start drinking more of this juice.

As celery is filled with vitamins and nutrients,
it is perfect to satiate your cravings.

Since it is low in calories, making a habit
of consuming more of this juice will help
you shed more weight sooner than you think.
Do you find this video interesting so far?
Please don't forget to subscribe to my channel.

Hit the Like button and ring the notification
bell if you want to see more content like
this.

#2 PREVENT LIVER DISEASE
There are more than five hundred important
functions associated with the liver.

It is an important organ in the body that
helps in bile production, excretion of cholesterol,

and hormones; it also metabolizes fat and
proteins.

Alcohol, hepatitis, cirrhosis of the liver,
Hepatitis B and C are all diseases that affect
the liver and promote liver failure.

The good news is that regular consumption
of celery juice can protect liver health and
prevent these diseases.

#3 HELP LOWER CHOLESTEROL LEVELS
As much as possible, people are trying their

best to inhibit the risk of high levels of
cholesterols.

Having high levels of cholesterol increases
the risk of a heart attack.

So, how can celery help you reduce your cholesterol
level?
A unique compound has been found in celery.

It is called 3-n-butylphthalide, and it has
been proven lipid-lowering property.

This compound positively affects blood pressure
and acts as a diuretic.

It helps to reduce the density of the fluids,
and it also relaxes the arteries.

Alongside that, it reduces the resistance
of blood flow.

Through a study, the rats were given the celery
extract as part of their high-fat diet, and

they were observed to have lower levels of
lipids low concentrations of cholesterol in
their blood afterward.

Besides, a phytonutrient known as phthalides
content of celery juice helps relax the smooth

muscles around the blood vessels, leading
to low blood pressure.

#4 HELPS GET RID OF ACNE
Hormonal fluctuations often trigger acne.

Therefore, celery juice can maintain these
hormonal fluctuations, thereby minimizing
the incidence of acne.

Because of that, celery stick juice is also
recommended to be consumed for women a few
days before menstruation.

Because having anti-inflammatory properties,
celery juice is quite effective in helping
to cure stomach cramps.

#5 RICH IN ANTIOXIDANTS
The high content of beta carotene, vitamin

C, flavonoids, and other antioxidant compounds
in celery stalks makes it an antioxidant source.

Of course, this is very much needed by the
body because air pollution is getting worse

day by day and an unhealthy lifestyle makes
the body vulnerable to free radicals.

So, to meet the body's antioxidant needs,
celery juice can be an option to counter these

unwanted free cell radicals that are harmful
to the body.

#6 HELPS SMOOTH OUT THE DIGESTIVE SYSTEM
Celery contains a lot of fiber that works
to treat constipation.

It stimulates your digestive system, helping
it eliminate wastes easier.

If you suffer from constipation, celery juice
is highly recommended for you.

It's a natural laxative because it relaxes
the nerves in your bowels, making it easier
for your system to be more regular.
Celery aids digestion.

Indeed, it promotes the production of hydrochloric
acid in the stomach, allowing better digestion

of food and guaranteeing a non-acidic digestive
system.

It is also one of the richest vegetables in
fiber and water.

It is a natural prebiotic that nourishes our
intestinal flora.
It helps fight bloating and constipation.

#7 CELERY JUICE IS AN EXCELLENT HYPOTENSION
A chemical called phthalide in celery juice
has a remarkable effect on blood circulation.

It enhances the relaxation of the muscles
surrounding the arteries.

This muscle contributes to a vasodilating
effect and explains the decrease in blood
pressure.

The existence of mineral salts such as magnesium,
potassium, and calcium also wage war against
hypertension.

They regulate the imbalance in the number
of liquids existing in all the organisms.

Frequently, an excess of liquid causes a rise
in pressure in the blood vessels.
Celery also purifies the blood.
It makes it smoother.
Indeed, this vegetable facilitates blood circulation.

Efficient blood circulation in the blood vessels
is synonymous with moderate blood pressure.

#8 A GREAT ANTI-INFLAMMATORY DRINK
If you're battling with inflammation, take

advantage of that big green stick of celery
in your fridge!

Did you know that drinking one glass of celery
juice a day can lessen the risk of osteoporosis?

It can also help reduce the chances of encountering
inflammation in the muscles, tendons, and
other body parts.

It is the perfect juice if you exercise a
lot as well.

Additionally, it turns out that celery is
not only necessary for our body minerals and
vitamins.

It has other essential constituents, and they
are called phytonutrients.

Phytonutrients are the chemicals found in
most plants.

They act as the inhibitors of such various
threats.

#9 RELIEVE SKIN ISSUES AND PROMOTE A CLEAR
COMPLEXION

Women who want to have skin that always looks
young and without the slightest blemish concoct
formulas based on celery.
And it works.
Do you know why?
Because this ingredient contains antioxidants.

These antioxidants adequately fight against
premature aging of the skin in particular.

It also offers a moisturizing effect and a
glowing effect on the skin.

For the hair, celery juice is an effective
remedy for dandruff.
It vitalizes the scalp and promotes hair growth.

The antioxidant in celery-like polyacetylene
relieves inflammation.

Similarly, vitamin C, another antioxidant
in celery, also supports brain function.

#10 IMPROVE YOUR SLEEP
In case you are looking for insomnia remedies
right now.

This is one of the best celery juice advantages,
and you can start falling asleep on a nightly
basis without any issues.

It is an amazing benefit for some because
it is also a natural boost when you've had
a long and hard day.
The benefit is in the magnesium.

This mineral helps relax the nervous system,
so you feel tired and calm.

Those with magnesium deficiency will find
it harder to sleep and are often stressed
at even the slightest problem.

It is not easy to control until you deal with
the deficiency problem.

Drinking celery juice also helps to normalize
blood pressure.

This is a common reason for insomnia because
it can raise stress levels.

#11 HELP PREVENTS CANCER
The antioxidant in celery contributes greatly
to preventing the most dreaded disease, cancer.

Apart from the antioxidant, there are also
coumarins.

This shields every cell in our body against
cancer.

The polyacetylenes found in this juice also
inhibit the development of potentially cancerous
cells.

The risk of getting pancreatic cancer is probably
reduced under the effect of two polyphenols,
including luteolin and apigenin.

It also contains phytoestrogen, which, in
cooperation with estrogen, prevents the proliferation
of cancer cells in the uterus and breast.
You have been warned, ladies.

This is why this celery juice is powerful
for our health and wellbeing.

#12 IT SUPPORTS HYDRATION
Celery juice has high water content and is
about 95 percent water by weight.

The water in celery is excellent for keeping
you hydrated.

It's easy to see why this is critical, as
water is involved with numerous reactions
and processes throughout our body.

Even being mildly dehydrated is sufficient
to decrease your energy levels and concentration.

Chronic dehydration can lead to many other
health problems and potentially increase disease
risk.

Getting sufficient water is one of the easiest
ways to keep you healthy and doing well.

Drinking water should still be your main go-to,
but water-rich foods like celery can help
promote Hydration.

Drinking celery juice should be a habit you
have to grow.

You need to understand that it's not a complete
solution to the condition you are facing,

but it can alleviate the symptoms by ensuring
that you are getting the right amount of micronutrients.

The juice even comes packed with essential
potassium vitamins, including K, C, A, which
boosts Hydration, among other benefits.

Before eating anything else, you need to take
at least sixteen ounces of celery juice for
maximum nutritional value.

You still have to make sure that it is fresh
and plain without additional ingredients.

You should know that this juice is medicinal
and not caloric.

This implies that you'll still need to take
breakfast to get you through the morning.

But, this should be done sixteen minutes after
consuming your juice.

Will you start drinking celery juice after
watching this video?
Let us know in the comment section below.

Make sure to subscribe so you don’t miss
out on my future videos.
Don’t forget to like and share.
Stay Healthy.

heard on the show as medical advice. This information should be used for

medical advice. Now get off me. So we're on our video. Why signs of low

really figure out because when you're looking at the studies, most of the studies out there regarding
celery juice in any way are really about looking at some of the nutrients in
celery being effective at being an antioxidant. And I'll put some links to some of those
studies down below in the description of this video. But when
you're really looking at, is a study going to show is celery
juice good for low stomach acid or hypochlorhydria? You're probably
not going to find that study. I've never found one who's really going
to pay for that study. Celery farmers, they're not going to pay for that study. So that study probably might not ever
show up and we might just be left figuring this stuff out for ourselves. But we hear so much good about people
using cell reju and we've seen a lot of our clients really benefit
from using cell rejuice. So I just want to explain a little bit
about what we can look at when we're viewing cell re reduce in
regards to low stomach acid. So for the body to make
hydrochloric acid or stomach acid, a lot of people call it HCL. The body needs resources to
make that hydrochloric acid. There's a lot of minerals
and other nutrients that are
needed for the body to be able to make that hydrochloric acid. And if someone isn't making
enough hydrochloric acid, they can't really break down their
food enough to get all the minerals and nutrients out of the
food that they're eating. So a person can get stuck in this broken
cycle of not being able to make enough hydrochloric acid to
break their food down, but also not being able to break their
food down enough to get the nutrients out of the food to make
more hydrochloric acid. It appears that cell rejuice has a
lot of the nutrients the body needs to be able to make more of
its own hydrochloric acid. So when some people are drinking cell
rejuice on a daily basis or a few times a week that they may be supplying their
body with the nutrients that it needs to be able to make more hydrochloric acid. And if the person can start making more
hydrochloric acid and breaking their food down better, then they may be able to access more
nutrients from their food and supply the body with more nutrients needed
to make more hydrochloric acid. So they might be able to get out of that
broken cycle and get into a, Hey, wow, look at me. Things work
right type of cycle. So that's why a lot of people can see
some benefits from using celery juice. Now, I have not seen a whole lot of clients
just fix low stomach by just drinking cell reduced. For most of the people
that I've seen and that I've heard from, they really need to take more steps
than just drinking cell reduced. I have heard from people like in comments
and videos of our other videos about cell reduced. I've heard
from people that say, yeah, I fixed all this stuff
just drinking cell reduced. So it appears that some people are
correcting things just with celery juice. I just haven't seen it
firsthand a whole lot. I have seen some clients that improve
their low stomach acids by just adding a quality sea salt and giving the body
more minerals and that chloride ion in that salt that the body
needs to make hydrochloric acid. I've seen that happen a few
times, but that's pretty rare too. Most people when they go to
fix low stomach acid need
to take steps to wipe out the bacterial overgrowth that might be
in the stomach and really maybe supply their body with supplemental HCL to
help them synthesize that digestive process so they can break down their
food better and get more nutrients out of the food and then give the body
tools it needs to make it on its own. So that seems to be the steps that
I see people really succeed with. But another benefit that could be
coming from this celery juice is that it appears to have the ability to kill
off some bacteria in the stomach. So if somebody has a bacterial
overgrowth in the stomach, which is really common, if someone is not making enough stomach
acid because it's the stomach acid that fries all the bacteria that comes
in on the food that we're eating, they die in an acid bath when a
person is making enough stomach acid. So if someone isn't making stomach acid, it's really common for bacteria to come
in and be able to set up camp and kind of take over. And I'll put some links to some studies
showing this in the description below the video as well. But it appears that celery juice has the
ability to kill off bacteria for some people. So if a person is drinking celery
juice and that's helping them kill off bacteria, well that can
do a couple of things. It can reduce the bacterial load
in the stomach. So bacteria, a lot of them will put
out an alkaline waste, which can alkalize that stomach even
more and make it like an alkaline environment and make it harder
to acidify the food correctly. Like the person might be
making some stomach acid. But if there's all this waste from
bacteria alkalizing the stomach, it can neutralize those acids before
they can really help you break down your food. So if celery juice is helping
them kill off some bacteria, then that could help that stomach become
more of an acidic environment if the person is making stomach acids. So you can see if it can supply the person
with nutrients they need to make more HCL or if it has the ability to kill
off some bacteria that really could improve low stomach acid issues
For some folks, in my experience, it's usually just on enough. Most people need to take other
steps to kill off bacteria too. Some people do things like maybe they'll
use delaine or mastic gum or some other type of antimicrobial supplement
because some bacteria like an h pylori infection can be really aggressive and
really difficult to really get under control and most people need
to use more than one thing. But you can see that for some people they
may really see some benefits from this cell reduce, just don't use
cell reduce like it's magic. Like a lot of people are going to
tell you it's really not magic. Most people are going to
need them to take more steps. But if I have a client who's having low
